title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise canceling with two processors and eight microphones. Up to 30-hour battery life with quick charging. Exceptional call quality with precisely positioned microphones.

title: Apple MacBook Air M2
description: Supercharged by the next-generation M2 chip. With up to 18 hours of battery life, fanless design and a stunning 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display.

title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: 200MP camera with AI-powered photography. Built-in S Pen for precision and creativity. Titanium frame with Gorilla Armor for exceptional durability.

title: iPad Pro 12.9-inch M4
description: The ultimate iPad experience with the M4 chip. Ultra Retina XDR display with nano-texture glass option. Works seamlessly with Apple Pencil Pro.

title: Nike Air Max 270 React
description: The Nike Air Max 270 React combines two of Nike's greatest technologies for unmatched cushioning. The full-length React foam midsole delivers a soft, springy ride.

title: Levi's 501 Original Jeans
description: The original blue jean since 1873. The 501 is the most iconic pair of jeans ever created. Straight fit with button fly, made from 100% cotton denim.

title: Adidas Ultraboost 23
description: Experience incredible energy return with every stride. BOOST midsole provides incredible energy return. Primeknit+ upper adapts to your foot for a custom fit.

title: Ray-Ban Aviator Sunglasses
description: The iconic aviator style born on the aerobases in 1937. Crystal lenses for superior optical clarity. Gold metal frame that is both lightweight and durable.

title: IKEA KALLAX Shelf Unit
description: Versatile shelf unit that can be used both vertically and horizontally. Can also be used as a room divider. 4 compartments for flexible storage.

title: Dyson V15 Detect Vacuum
description: Laser reveals microscopic dust. Automatically adapts suction across different floor types. Up to 60 minutes of run time for whole-home cleaning.

title: Nespresso Vertuo Next Coffee Maker
description: 5 cup sizes from espresso to alto. Smart connectivity via Bluetooth and WiFi. Sustainable pods made from 80% recycled aluminum.

title: Apple Watch Series 9
description: Advanced health sensors including blood oxygen and ECG. S9 chip with Double Tap gesture. Crash Detection and Emergency SOS. Up to 18 hours battery.

title: Sony 65" BRAVIA XR A95L OLED TV
description: QD-OLED display with Cognitive Processor XR for perfectly natural picture. Perfect for PS5 gaming with 4K 120Hz and VRR. Acoustic Surface Audio+.

title: Fossil Gen 6 Smartwatch
description: Wear OS by Google smartwatch with Snapdragon 4100+ platform. Health tracking with SpO2, heart rate, and sleep insights. Rapid charging.

title: Philips Hue Starter Kit
description: Smart lighting starter kit with 4 A19 bulbs and Hue Bridge. 16 million colors and adjustable whites from warm to cool. Works with Alexa, Google, and Apple HomeKit.

title: Canon EOS R50 Mirrorless Camera
description: 24.2 MP APS-C sensor for stunning image quality. Dual Pixel CMOS AF II with subject detection tracking. 4K video recording. Compact and lightweight body.

title: Leather Crossbody Bag
description: Genuine full-grain leather crossbody bag with adjustable strap. Multiple compartments for organized storage. Perfect for everyday carry.

title: Patagonia Nano Puff Jacket
description: PrimaLoft Gold Insulation Eco keeps you warm when wet. Windproof and water-resistant. Packs into its own chest pocket. Made with recycled materials.

title: Ember Temperature Control Mug
description: Keep your coffee or tea at the perfect temperature for up to 80 minutes. Control with the Ember App. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant.

title: JBL Clip 4 Portable Speaker
description: Bold JBL Original Pro Sound with dynamic range. IP67 waterproof and dustproof. Built-in carabiner for easy attachment. 10 hours of battery life.

title: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: MagSpeed electromagnetic scrolling that is 90% quieter. 8K DPI precision sensor works on any surface, even glass. USB-C charging with full charge in 3 hours.

title: Scented Soy Candle Set
description: Set of 4 hand-poured soy wax candles in seasonal scents. Cotton wicks for a clean burn. Up to 50 hours burn time per candle. Gift-ready packaging.
